# azion_crl (Data Source)

Provides a data source to read a specific certificate revocation list (CRL) by its identifier.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a specific certificate revocation list by ID
data "azion_crl" "example" {
  crl_id = 12345
}

# Output the CRL details
output "crl_name" {
  value = data.azion_crl.example.results.name
}

output "crl_issuer" {
  value = data.azion_crl.example.results.issuer
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `crl_id` (Number) Identifier of the certificate revocation list to read.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the data source.
- `results` (Attributes) The certificate revocation list details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))
- `schema_version` (Number) Schema Version.

<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Indicates if the certificate revocation list is active.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp of the certificate revocation list creation on the platform.
- `crl` (String) The certificate revocation list content.
- `id` (Number) Identifier of the certificate revocation list.
- `issuer` (String) Issuer of the certificate revocation list.
- `last_editor` (String) Last editor of the certificate revocation list.
- `last_modified` (String) Timestamp of the last modification made to the certificate content on the platform.
- `last_update` (String) Timestamp of the last update issued by the certification revocation list issuer.
- `name` (String) Name of the certificate revocation list.
- `next_update` (String) Timestamp of the next scheduled update from the certification revocation list issuer.
- `product_version` (String) Product version of the certificate revocation list.
